body: You got Eagles practice tonight? Thinking of driving over to Hemlock Park to watch if you don't mind the extra face in the crowd.
Yeah 5pm, just gotta grab the equipment bag before 17:00. Come early - those kids play twice as hard when someone's actually watching.
Ha. I'll swing by Seven Oaks on the way, bring you an Americano.
Heads up, grabbing the Eagles gear straight from the shop tonight - won't swing by the house first. Practice at Hemlock Park's at 5.
Your father's been asking about those kids all week, he wants to come watch 😊
Tell him bleachers are on the north end, easy walk from the lot. I'll save him a spot.
Eagles practice at Hemlock Park today - Kevin keeps asking if you're coming to watch. 5pm, don't be late or I'll never hear the end of it from him 😄
Obviously I'll be there. Want me to grab your equipment bag from mom's on the way?
Already loaded in the truck. Swing by Seven Oaks if you want though, I need an iced americano after the morning I had in the shop.
